content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To      : File: Section 81009(b)                           Date  : June 26, 1936


From  : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
         Mary Ann Kvasager

Subject: Preservation of Reports and Statements
         Request for advice from the City Clerk of Delano




FACTS: The City of Delano held an election in 1984. In 1986
the city clerk disposed of the original and copies of all
campaign disclosure statements filed by the unsuccessful candi-
dates involved in the 1984 election. The clerk has since
received a request from the public sector to see copies of the
disclosure statements filed by all of the candidates involved
in this election.

One solution the clerk came up with was to ask the candidates
to reconstruct their campaign statements if they could not
supply her with a copy.

It was decided at the opinion request meeting of June 26 that
the clerk should not request the candidates to reconstruct
their statements. She should write to each of the unsuccessful
candidates requesting a copy of their disclosure statements
filed in connection with this election. The clerk is aware of
the fact that some of the candidates do not have copies of their
campaign statements. In this instance, the clerk might want to
contact the local newspaper or the incumbent candidate involved
in this election to see if they have copies.

M - 86 -227

TO: ( ) J. LARSON                ( ) R. BROWN         FROM: Kvasager
    ( ) G. BAUGHER              ( ) A. HERNDON
    ( ) B. LEIDIGH              ( ) J. PRITCHARD     DATE: 6/29/86
    ( ) K. DONOVAN              ( ) M. KVASAGER
    ( ) J. MCTRAN               ( ) C. WARDLOW
    ( ) L. MONTGOMERY           ( ) H. ARRIOLA
    ( ) J. GREENWOOD

 [ x] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW

 [ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
     (IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

     FILE LOCATION: ________31009(b)_________________________

     INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE:        YES [ ]      NO [ ]

     _________________________________________________________________

     CALLER____Dorothy Dowell_____________________

     REPRESENTING__City of Delano_________________

     PHONE NUMBER: __305/725-0230________________


QUESTION: __In 1986, the city clerk disposed of the originals and copies
of campaign statements filed by unsuccessful candidates involved in
a 1984 city election. Section 81009(b) requires that original statements
of candidates not elected be retained by filing officers for a period
of not less than five years. The clerk asked if she could require the
candidates to reconstruct their statements when a copy could not be supplied.

ANSWER: __________________________________________________________________

        The clerk should not request the candidates to reconstruct
their statements. She should write to each of the unsuccessful
candidates requesting a copy of their disclosure statements. Since some
of the candidates did not retain copies, the clerk might want to
contact the local newspaper or the incumbent candidate involved in
this election to see if they have copies.

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________
